items.title: Bouncy Castles & Playground
items.description: Designed for children aged 3 to 12. Includes various bouncy castles, a two-story playground, slides, climbing walls, and a ball pit. A safe space where children can play freely.
items.details: Children must always wear socks. Supervision by a responsible adult in the surrounding area is mandatory.

items.title: Climbing Forest
items.description: The climbing forest offers courses between platforms in the treetops. Push your limits with suspension bridges, nets, and tunnels.
items.details: Safety gear (harness) included. Briefing mandatory. Courses with different difficulty levels available.

items.title: Climbing Tower
items.description: Our climbing tower features 4 routes with varying levels of difficulty. Test your strength and agility in complete safety.
items.details: Automatic 'TruBlue' belay system. Supervision by specialized instructors. Minimum height: 1.10m.

items.title: Paintball
items.description: A battlefield right in the forest. Hide behind trees, develop strategies with your team, and eliminate opponents with paintballs.
items.details: Includes marker, mask, vest, and 100 paintballs. Additional refills available. Minimum of 6 participants.

items.title: Trampolines
items.description: Jump, spin, and have fun in our trampoline zone. A great activity to burn off a lot of energy!
items.details: Sessions of 30 minutes. Non-slip socks are mandatory. Maximum 1 person per trampoline.

parties.title_part2: you can recreate your universe – for the perfect party!

01.title: Choose Activities
01.text: Choose from Climbing Forest, Paintball, Climbing Tower, and much more.

02.title: Define the Menu
02.text: We have catering options for every taste and requirement.

03.title: Invite Friends
03.text: We have space for small groups and large events.

04.title: Have Fun!
04.text: Our team takes care of safety and animation.

faq.subtitle: Didn't find what you are looking for?

faqs.question: What are the opening hours?
faqs.answer: We are open daily from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM in winter and from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM in summer. We recommend making a reservation in advance.

faqs.question: What is the minimum age for activities?
faqs.answer: The minimum age varies depending on the activity. For the playground from 3 years, for the climbing forest from 6 years (1.10m).

faqs.question: Is an advance reservation necessary?
faqs.answer: It is highly recommended, especially on weekends and public holidays, to avoid waiting times.

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: Comfortable sports clothing and sturdy shoes (sneakers). No open shoes or sandals when climbing.

faqs.question: Do you host children's birthday parties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer special birthday packages with reserved tables and catering.

intro.title: WEG WAY is an adventure park in the heart of a protected forest.
intro.description: We offer the residents of the greater Berlin area sports activities in harmony with nature.
intro.feature_text: Our qualified team attaches great importance to nature conservation and the safety of all participants. Our park complies with all applicable European standards so that you can enjoy yourself carefree.

reviews.name: Stefan M.
reviews.text: "A fantastic day with the family! The kids loved the climbing forest and felt super safe with the instructors. The place is very beautiful and well-maintained. We will definitely come back!"

reviews.name: Petra R.
reviews.text: "Excellent place for birthday parties. The organization was impeccable and the kids weren't still for a second. Paintball was the highlight of the day for the older ones."

footer.description: Adventure, nature and fun in Berlin, Grunewald. Your favorite park.

booking.header_subtitle: Secure your tickets for WEG WAY now
booking.disclaimer: * Payment is made on site. Cancellation up to 24h before free of charge.
